This has further solidified their position in value creation for the long term. The company's resilient operating performance has led to continuous growth and sustainability.

data.title: Deere & Co invests $70 million in NC facility; Trump praises 'only excavator entirely made' in US.
data.description: President Donald Trump disclosed plans for a new John Deere facility under Deere & Co. in the US. The $70 million excavator manufacturing plant will be located in Kernersville, North Carolina, as announced during Trump's speech in Clive, Iowa. This facility aims to be the sole excavator produced entirely in the USA. In addition, John Deere confirmed the plan, along with the commencement of constructing a distribution center near Hebron, Indiana. Through the Kernersville plant, John Deere's manufacturing capabilities will be bolstered with the use of cutting-edge technologies to manufacture top-tier excavators for the construction industry. The facility will take over the production of next-gen excavators previously manufactured elsewhere.

data.title: Global automotive transmission market valued at USD 163.39 billion in 2026, projected to reach USD 209.72 billion by 2031 with 5.12% CAGR.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, a recent report by Mordor Intelligence reveals that the automotive transmission market is currently valued at USD 163.39 billion in 2026. Projections indicate that by 2031, this market is expected to reach USD 209.72 billion, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.12%. This growth is primarily attributed to the shift in consumer preferences and advancements in technology within the automotive industry.

data.title: LanzaTech's £600m SAF project at Saltend Chemical Park to create 300 jobs. Expected to produce 80,000 tonnes of SAF annually.
data.description: LanzaTech Global, Inc (NASDAQ: LNZA) has disclosed that Saltend Chemicals Park in Humberside is the designated site for its groundbreaking DRAGON II project. This endeavor involves a substantial investment of £600 million aimed at mass-producing sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) and renewable diesel. The project is anticipated to generate approximately 80,000 tonnes of SAF, addressing roughly 1% of the UK's jet fuel demands, along with 8,000 tonnes of renewable diesel on an annual basis. The construction phase is predicted to create job opportunities for about 300 skilled workers, with 150 positions set to be available during the operational phase. Saltend Chemicals Park, managed by px Group within the Ara Partners portfolio of companies focusing on decarbonisation investments, offers top-notch infrastructure, utilities, deep-water jetty access, and an all-encompassing site services platform. Following a thorough evaluation of potential locations throughout the UK, px Group was selected for this project.

data.title: Robbyant releases LingBot-VLA as a "universal brain" for robots, reducing costs. Adapted by leading manufacturers, including Galaxea Dynamics and AgileX Robotics.
data.description: In Shanghai, Robbyant, an embodied AI company under Ant Group, unveiled the open-source launch of LingBot-VLA, a vision-language-action (VLA) model aimed at functioning as a versatile solution for practical robotics. This technology aims to lower post-training expenses and quicken the process towards extensive implementation. LingBot-VLA has already been integrated into robots from major makers like Galaxea Dynamics and AgileX Robotics, showcasing effective cross-morphology compatibility.

data.title: Villas of Distinction® adds luxury villas in iconic destinations, expanding with private villas across the United.
data.description: A luxury villa rental company, Villas of Distinction®, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, announced on January 28, 2026, that they are enhancing their collection by incorporating exclusive private villas in various locations worldwide. This expansion includes stunning properties on a private island along the Amalfi Coast, as well as retreats in mountain and coastal settings. Villas of Distinction® is known for offering high-end accommodations and has added a considerable number of new properties to their portfolio to cater to the growing demand for luxury villa rentals.

data.title: Avro Aerospace and Microlynx partner for Canadian space launch and Arctic security, after reaching technical milestones.
data.description: Two Canadian companies, Avro Aerospace and Microlynx Systems Limited, have joined forces to provide sovereign space launch capabilities and enhance Arctic security. This partnership comes after reaching significant technical achievements. The collaboration aims to advance their long-standing cooperation and boost their presence in the aerospace industry. The companies unveiled their plans in Calgary, Alberta on January 28, 2026. This development signifies a significant milestone for both companies as they work towards expanding their operations in these strategic sectors.

data.title: Pacific Edge's Cxbladder Triage validated in Kaiser study, in largest urine-based biomarker research, affirms clinical utility.
data.description: Pleased to announce is Pacific Edge, a leading cancer diagnostics firm trading on NZX and ASX under ticker symbols PEB. In the journal 'Urology Practice', a Kaiser Permanente study showcasing the practical effectiveness of Cxbladder Triage has been published. This study, the largest ever conducted on urine-based biomarkers, demonstrates the real-world clinical utility of Cxbladder Triage for patients being assessed.
